description: You are a BIM Coordinator preparing a Health & Safety model for the FZK-Haus project. Model at least two 3D hazard zones in the pre-loaded Bonsai/BlenderBIM architectural model according to the safety requirements brief on the Desktop. Assign the zones to the correct IFC class, apply the custom property set (Pset_Risk) with required properties, and apply a material to highlight them. Save the enriched model to /home/ga/BIMProjects/fzk_safety_hazards.ifc.

metadata.pass_score_note: threshold=65, requires saving file, at least one hazard, and the custom Pset attached
